subcodes.first_line: Thy petition hath attained unto the Throne, and whatsoever was mentioned therein hath become manifest, God willing, through the grace of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات بمقر عرش فائز و آنچه در او مذکور مشهود گشت انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
